<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<h1>Source code for booktx.markdown_io</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Markdown extraction and rebuild.</span>

<span class="sd">Extraction walks a markdown document with :mod:`markdown_it`, identifies the</span>
<span class="sd">translatable prose spans (the ``inline`` tokens inside paragraphs, headings,</span>
<span class="sd">list items, blockquotes, and table cells), hides inline code / link URLs / raw</span>
<span class="sd">HTML behind ``__TAG_NNN__`` tokens, hides protected names behind</span>
<span class="sd">``__NAME_NNN__`` tokens, and returns:</span>

<span class="sd">- a **template** — the original markdown with each translatable inline replaced</span>
<span class="sd">  by a ``__SPANTX_NNNN__`` placeholder; and</span>
<span class="sd">- a list of :class:`~booktx.chunking.ProseSpan` in placeholder order.</span>

<span class="sd">Non-translatable blocks (YAML front matter, fenced code, indented code, HTML</span>
<span class="sd">blocks) are left untouched in the template.</span>

<span class="sd">Rebuild is the inverse: substitute each ``__SPANTX_NNNN__`` with the supplied</span>
<span class="sd">translated span text (already name/tag-restored by ``build.py``).</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">markdown_it</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">MarkdownIt</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">markdown_it.token</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Token</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chunking</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ProseSpan</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Placeholder</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.placeholders</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">protect_names</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;MarkdownExtraction&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;FRONT_MATTER_RE&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;extract_markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;build_markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;split_front_matter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>

<span class="c1">#: Translatable container types whose inline children we extract from.</span>
<span class="c1"># (Imported from booktx.placeholders — local aliases for backward compat.)</span>
<span class="n">_TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS</span>
<span class="n">_SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES</span>
<span class="n">_SPANTX_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;__SPANTX_(\d</span><span class="si">{4}</span><span class="s2">)__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1">#: YAML front matter at the very start of a document.</span>
<span class="n">FRONT_MATTER_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\A---\r?\n(.*?\r?\n)---\r?\n?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">DOTALL</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Inline non-translatable patterns, applied to each inline token&#39;s raw content.</span>
<span class="c1"># Order matters: code first (so URLs inside code are not double-processed), then</span>
<span class="c1"># link/image destinations, then raw inline HTML.</span>
<span class="n">_INLINE_CODE_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;`[^`\n]+`&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_LINK_DEST_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;(?&lt;=\])\(([^)\s]*)(?:\s+</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">[^</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">]*</span><span class="se">\&quot;</span><span class="s2">)?\)&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_RAW_HTML_INLINE_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;[^&gt;\n]+&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="MarkdownExtraction">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.markdown_io.MarkdownExtraction">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">MarkdownExtraction</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Result of :func:`extract_markdown`.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">template</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">front_matter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="split_front_matter">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.markdown_io.split_front_matter">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_front_matter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Split leading YAML front matter from the body.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns ``(front_matter_with_fences, body)``. If there is no front matter,</span>
<span class="sd">    ``front_matter`` is empty and ``body`` is the original text.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">m</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">FRONT_MATTER_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">m</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">text</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">m</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">m</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">:]</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_hide_inline_nontranslatables</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tag_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Replace inline code / link URLs / raw HTML with ``__TAG_NNN__`` tokens.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns the rewritten text, the new placeholders, and the next free tag id.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">spans_to_hide</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">m</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_INLINE_CODE_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">spans_to_hide</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">m</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">m</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_LINK_DEST_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="c1"># Hide just the URL portion, keep the parentheses.</span>
        <span class="n">spans_to_hide</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">m</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">m</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_RAW_HTML_INLINE_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">finditer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">spans_to_hide</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">m</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="c1"># Deduplicate while keeping longest-first ordering for safe replacement.</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">unique</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans_to_hide</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">reverse</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">unique</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw</span>
    <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tag_start</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">original</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">unique</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">original</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;__TAG_</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">idx</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">03d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">__&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">original</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;tag&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">idx</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_collect_inline_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tokens</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Token</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Token</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return translatable ``inline`` tokens in document order.</span>

<span class="sd">    An inline token is translatable when its nearest enclosing block is one of</span>
<span class="sd">    :data:`_TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS` and it is not inside a skipped block.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Token</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="c1"># Stack of open block types so we know the parent of each inline.</span>
    <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tok</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">tokens</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">ttype</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tok</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">type</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ttype</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Self-contained skipped block; following tokens are outside it.</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ttype</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_open&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ttype</span><span class="p">[:</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_open&quot;</span><span class="p">)])</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ttype</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_close&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pop</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ttype</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;inline&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">parent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">open_blocks</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="c1"># table cells use td/th open in the table plugin; also accept</span>
            <span class="c1"># &#39;paragraph&#39; inside blockquotes/list items.</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">parent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">tok</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tok</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="extract_markdown">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.markdown_io.extract_markdown">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">extract_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">MarkdownExtraction</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Extract translatable spans from ``text``.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns the rebuild template and the ordered prose spans.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">protected_terms</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">front_matter</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">body</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_front_matter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">md</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">MarkdownIt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;commonmark&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">})</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enable</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;table&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">md</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">body</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">inline_tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_collect_inline_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tokens</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Phase 1: hide inline non-translatables per-span, building tagged raw text.</span>
    <span class="n">tag_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">tagged_texts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">tag_placeholders_per_span</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tok</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">inline_tokens</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tok</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content</span>
        <span class="n">tagged</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">phs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tag_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_hide_inline_nontranslatables</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tag_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">tag_index</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">tagged_texts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tagged</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">tag_placeholders_per_span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">phs</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Phase 2: assign globally-consistent NAME tokens across the whole document.</span>
    <span class="n">joined_for_names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tagged_texts</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">name_map_result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">protect_names</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">joined_for_names</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">name_token_for</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">ph</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ph</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">token</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ph</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">name_map_result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">placeholders</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>

    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tagged</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tag_phs</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">zip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tagged_texts</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tag_placeholders_per_span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">strict</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">span_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tagged</span>
        <span class="n">name_phs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="c1"># Apply the global name map longest-first.</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">term</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name_token_for</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">reverse</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">term</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">span_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">span_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">name_token_for</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">])</span>
                <span class="n">name_phs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">name_token_for</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">original</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">term</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="c1"># Preserve the order a translator would see: tags + names by token id.</span>
        <span class="n">placeholders</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tag_phs</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">name_phs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">used_terms</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">original</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">name_phs</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">spans</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">used_terms</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Phase 3: build the template by replacing each inline&#39;s raw content with a</span>
    <span class="c1"># unique __SPANTX_NNNN__ placeholder, scanning the body sequentially so</span>
    <span class="c1"># repeated content is disambiguated by position.</span>
    <span class="n">template_body</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">body</span>
    <span class="n">rebuilt_parts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tok</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">inline_tokens</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tok</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content</span>
        <span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">template_body</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Could happen if content isn&#39;t a literal substring (rare). Fall</span>
            <span class="c1"># back to leaving the span unreplaced; rebuild will keep it.</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">rebuilt_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">template_body</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">found</span><span class="p">])</span>
        <span class="n">rebuilt_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;__SPANTX_</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">idx</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">found</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">rebuilt_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">template_body</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">:])</span>
    <span class="n">template_body</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rebuilt_parts</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">template</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">front_matter</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">template_body</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">front_matter</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">template_body</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">MarkdownExtraction</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">template</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">template</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">spans</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">front_matter</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">front_matter</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="build_markdown">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.markdown_io.build_markdown">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">template</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_replacements</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Rebuild markdown by substituting each ``__SPANTX_NNNN__`` in order.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``span_replacements[i]`` replaces the ``(i+1)``-th span placeholder. Extra</span>
<span class="sd">    replacements are ignored; missing replacements leave the token in place.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">template</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replacement</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_replacements</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;__SPANTX_</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">__&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">out</span></div>



<span class="c1"># span_token_ids is imported from booktx.placeholders above</span>
<span class="c1"># (kept as a module-level name for backward compatibility)</span>
</pre></div>
